NPC:JoinFlock.title: JoinFlock
NPC:JoinFlock.description: Tries to build/join flock with target. Fails if both NPC and target are in a flock. If either NPC or target are in a flock, the one not in flock tries to join existing flock.If NPC and target are both not in a flock, a new flock with NPC is created and target is tried to be joined.Joining the flock can be rejected if the joining entity does have the correct type or the flock is full. This can be overridden by setting the ForceJoin flag to true.

Type.description: Tries to build/join flock with target. Fails if both NPC and target are in a flock. If either NPC or target are in a flock, the one not in flock tries to join existing flock.If NPC and target are both not in a flock, a new flock with NPC is created and target is tried to be joined.Joining the flock can be rejected if the joining entity does have the correct type or the flock is full. This can be overridden by setting the ForceJoin flag to true.

ForceJoin.title: ForceJoin
ForceJoin.description: Disables checking flock join conditions test and forces joining flock.
